cases.title: TS-25: GpsNotPersisted — successful radius-validated check-in leaves no raw latitude/longitude in attendance tables
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database running via Compose
GpsNotPersisted integration suite per testing-plan §5
Active session, enrolled student, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
CheckInService.submit callable with in-radius coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200)
steps: Inspect attendance_records schema and confirm no client latitude/longitude columns per database design §4 and domain model §3.8
Invoke CheckInService.submit with valid tokenId and in-radius coordinates
Assert attendance transitions to Present with non-null checkedInAt
Query attendance_records for sessionId and studentId and assert no raw client coordinates stored
Query check_in_attempts for outcome Success and assert distance_meters populated but no raw lat/lng columns exist or are populated
Verify coordinates discarded after validation per NFR-12 target and AC-08d
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 TS-25 satisfied: raw latitude/longitude not stored in long-term attendance tables after successful radius check; only derived outcome and check-in timestamp retained

cases.title: CheckInService GpsNotPersisted: PostgreSQL transaction marks Present without writing client coordinates
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, enrollment, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
CheckInService orchestrates GeoVerificationService then serializable transaction per domain model §5.2
GeoVerificationService computes distanceMeters in memory from transient locationPayload
steps: Record beforeState: attendance Pending; verify no coordinate columns on attendance_records
Invoke CheckInService.submit with in-radius locationPayload (latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200)
Query attendance_records and assert afterState Present with checkedInAt set
Assert attendance_records and related long-term tables contain no latitude or longitude values for client device
Query check_in_attempts and assert distance_meters is numeric and within session gpsRadiusMeters
Verify CheckInRequest coordinates exist only in request handler memory per domain model §7.1 privacy note
cases.expected: Module-integration GpsNotPersisted suite: coordinates used for Haversine validation only then discarded at DB boundary; NFR-12 privacy invariant enforced

cases.title: Database schema review: attendance_records and check_in_attempts lack client coordinate columns
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with migrations applied per database design §4
information_schema or pg_catalog access in integration harness
steps: Query information_schema.columns for attendance_records and list all column names
Assert no columns named latitude, longitude, client_latitude, client_longitude, device_lat, or device_lng exist
Query information_schema.columns for check_in_attempts
Assert distance_meters column exists and no raw coordinate columns present
Confirm sessions.room_latitude and sessions.room_longitude exist (room GPS is instructor-configured, not client device)
Document schema conforms to database design §11 data retention: raw client GPS coordinates not stored
cases.expected: NFR-12 verification method satisfied at schema level: no coordinate columns on long-term attendance or attempt tables; room GPS on sessions is distinct from client device coordinates

cases.title: check_in_attempts stores distance_meters and spoof_flags but never raw client latitude/longitude
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL; successful and failed check-in attempts creatable via CheckInService
check_in_attempts table schema per database design §checkin-qr
steps: Complete successful check-in with in-radius coordinates via integration harness
SELECT all columns from check_in_attempts for the Success attempt row
Assert distance_meters IS NOT NULL and within expected range for fixture coordinates
Assert no latitude or longitude column values present on the row
Repeat for OutOfRadius attempt with outside coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
Assert OutOfRadius attempt has distance_meters logged but still no raw lat/lng persisted per BR-02
cases.expected: NFR-12 and BR-02: distance logged for audit without long-term coordinate storage on both success and failure paths

cases.title: Successful check-in state transition retains Present, checkedInAt, and distance_meters only
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with attendance_records row beforeState Pending
Active session with room GPS and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Valid QrToken; CheckInService.submit callable with in-radius coordinates
steps: Record beforeState: attendance Pending, no checkedInAt, no distance_meters on related attempt
Invoke CheckInService.submit with in-radius locationPayload
Assert afterState: attendance Present with checkedInAt timestamp set
Assert check_in_attempts row has outcome Success and distance_meters populated
Assert afterState contains no client coordinate fields on attendance_records or check_in_attempts
Verify only derived outcome (Present), distance for audit, and check-in timestamp retained per NFR-12 target
cases.expected: beforeState Pending without coordinates; afterState Present with checkedInAt and distance_meters audit field; raw device coordinates never enter persisted state

cases.title: OutOfRadius rejection persists distance_meters audit value without raw client coordinates
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Pending attendance for enrolled student and Active session
Valid QrToken; outside-radius coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172) ~167 m from room (10.762622, 106.660172)
steps: Invoke CheckInService.submit with outside-radius locationPayload
Assert CheckInAttempt outcome OutOfRadius inserted
Query check_in_attempts and assert distance_meters > session gpsRadiusMeters
Assert no latitude or longitude values stored on check_in_attempts or attendance_records
Query attendance_records and assert status remains Pending (not Present)
Verify BR-02 outcome: distance value logged for audit without persisting raw coordinates long-term
cases.expected: NFR-12 applies to failure paths: OutOfRadius logs derived distance for fraud audit but never stores submitted latitude/longitude

cases.title: Structured application logs exclude raw latitude and longitude after check-in processing
preconditions: API running with structured JSON logging enabled per NFR-21
Log capture fixture or test log sink wired to check-in request handler
Active session with enrolled student and Valid QrToken
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with in-radius coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200) using Student session
Collect structured log entries for the request correlation ID
Assert log fields contain endpoint, outcome, sessionId, and correlation ID
Assert no log field contains raw latitude 10.762700 or longitude 106.660200 values
Verify error-handling §6.1 never-log rule: passwords, session secrets, raw latitude/longitude excluded
Repeat for OutOfRadius failure and assert submitted coordinates absent from warn-level logs
cases.expected: NFR-12 privacy baseline extends to observability: raw GPS never appears in application logs per error-handling §6.1 and NFR-21 structured logging target

cases.title: POST /api/v1/check-in 200 Success response envelope excludes client latitude and longitude
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie set
Active sessionId with Valid QrToken and in-radius coordinates available
API design §6.3 documents latitude/longitude discarded after validation
steps: Send POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId, latitude: 10.762700, longitude: 106.660200, spoofMetadata: { mockLocationDetected: false } }
Assert HTTP status 200 and outcome Success with attendance.status Present
Parse response JSON and assert no latitude, longitude, clientLat, clientLng, or deviceCoordinates fields present
Assert response contains checkedInAt timestamp but not submitted GPS values
Verify API design §6.3 field table: latitude/longitude discarded after validation, not persisted or echoed
cases.expected: HTTP 200 Success contract does not leak submitted device coordinates in response body; NFR-12 data minimization visible at API boundary

cases.title: GET /api/v1/attendance/me/history response excludes raw GPS coordinates from all records
preconditions: Student with at least one successful Present check-in in PostgreSQL
check_in_attempts row exists with distance_meters for the session
Authenticated Student session for the record owner
steps: GET /api/v1/attendance/me/history?limit=20 with Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 with cursor pagination envelope (items, nextCursor) per API design §7.3 and §10.1
For each item in items array assert fields include sessionDate, subject, status, checkInTime when Present
Assert no item contains latitude, longitude, distanceMeters, or raw coordinate fields in student-facing API
Verify student personal history exposes only derived attendance outcome per FR-14 and NFR-12
cases.expected: Student attendance history API returns self-scoped records without device GPS coordinates; privacy minimization enforced on read path

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin CSV export columns exclude student device GPS coordinates
preconditions: Closed session with multiple Present students who checked in with GPS validation
Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session with report:export permission
Attendance data includes check_in_attempts with distance_meters
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with date filter covering the closed session using Admin session
Assert HTTP status 200 with CSV download
Parse CSV header row and assert columns per API design §8.3: institutional_id, display_name, class_code, subject_code, session_date, attendance_status, checked_in_at
Assert CSV contains no latitude, longitude, gps, or coordinate columns
Verify database design §11: raw client GPS coordinates not stored and therefore not exportable
cases.expected: Admin CSV export per AC-13a cannot expose device GPS because NFR-12 prevents coordinate persistence; export contains only permitted derived fields

cases.title: Flow A step 4: workshop check-in completes GPS validation without persisting client coordinates
preconditions: Flow A steps 1–3 complete: roster seeded, session opened Active with room GPS, QR token polled
Authenticated enrolled Student session established
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200 outcome Valid per BR-15
Student coordinates within session gpsRadiusMeters (10.762700, 106.660200)
tokenId extracted from qrPayload returned in step 3
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight with Student session and assert 200 outcome Valid (read-only; no coordinate persistence)
POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId from Flow A step 3 and in-radius latitude/longitude using Student session
Assert HTTP 200 outcome Success with attendance Present
Query check_in_attempts and assert distance_meters ≤ session gpsRadiusMeters
Query attendance_records and check_in_attempts and assert no raw lat/lng persisted
Verify Flow A happy path satisfies NFR-12 alongside functional check-in success
cases.expected: Flow A lifecycle includes NFR-12 invariant: GPS used for radius validation during step 4 then discarded; only Present outcome and audit distance retained

cases.title: Student denied GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance cannot retrieve peer GPS metadata via session roster API
preconditions: Student A with successful Present check-in and check_in_attempts row with distance_meters
Closed session with attendance records for Student A and peer students
Student B authenticated in different session
No raw coordinates stored in database per NFR-12 baseline
steps: Student B sends GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance using Student B session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden with errorCode Forbidden per AC-14b
Assert response body contains no records array, peer student data, or check-in attempt metadata
Assert response contains no latitude, longitude, or distance_meters fields for any student
Verify Student B GET /api/v1/attendance/me/history returns only self-scoped rows without coordinate fields
cases.expected: NFR-12 defense in depth: even if coordinate storage were attempted, RBAC self-scoping denies cross-student access to check-in attempt details

cases.title: 150 parallel successful check-ins each discard coordinates without any lat/lng row appearing in database
preconditions: ConcurrentCheckIn integration fixture with 150 unique enrolled students
Active session with 150 Valid QrTokens
Each student submits distinct in-radius coordinates via parallel CheckInService.submit
steps: Launch 150 parallel check-in submissions with unique studentId and coordinates
Assert 150 Success outcomes and 150 Present rows
Run aggregate SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name IN ('attendance_records','check_in_attempts') AND column_name ILIKE '%lat%'
Assert zero client coordinate columns exist across all 150 attempt rows
Sample 10 random check_in_attempts rows and assert distance_meters populated with no coordinate fields
Verify NFR-12 holds under pilot-scale concurrency per NFR-02 load scenario
cases.expected: GPS data minimization invariant holds under 150 concurrent check-ins: no coordinate persistence race or batch insert leak

cases.title: Mobile check-in success journey does not display or persist raw GPS coordinates beyond transient capture
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport 375×812 (iOS Safari or Android Chrome)
Active session check-in deep link /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Playwright harness with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true per testing-plan §8 and NFR-24
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200 outcome Valid for enrolled student
No prior location consent in localStorage (first visit)
Browser geolocation granted with in-radius mock coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200)
DevTools access to localStorage, sessionStorage, and network responses
steps: Navigate to check-in page on mobile viewport
Verify LocationConsentBanner shows Vietnamese privacy copy per ui-ux-foundation §8: Tọa độ GPS không được lưu sau khi điểm danh thành công
Accept consent; verify validating_token inline state during preflight; GpsCaptureStep mounts only after preflight 200 per BR-15
Verify GPS ready substate shows Vị trí đã sẵn sàng without spinner or exact latitude/longitude digits per AC-08f
Tap submit control (Xác nhận điểm danh) and wait for success panel with Present status
Inspect localStorage and sessionStorage and assert no latitude, longitude, or geolocation cache entries
Inspect POST /check-in response body and assert no coordinate fields echoed back
Navigate to /history and verify Present entry shows check-in time without GPS coordinates
cases.expected: NFR-12 UI-facing verification: client uses GPS transiently for submission; success and history views expose no raw device coordinates per tech stack §GPS privacy

cases.title: Student personal attendance history page lists sessions without GPS coordinate columns or detail fields
preconditions: Authenticated Student with at least one Present check-in after GPS-validated session
Student logged in on desktop or mobile viewport
Attendance history route /history accessible
steps: Navigate to /history attendance list page
Verify table or card columns show session date, subject, status, and check-in time when Present
Assert no column header or field label for GPS, tọa độ, latitude, longitude, or vị trí thiết bị
Open any session detail drawer or row expansion if present
Assert detail view contains no coordinate values or distance_meters exposed to student
Verify FR-14 personal history respects NFR-12 data minimization on read UI
cases.expected: Browser journey confirms student-facing UI never surfaces stored or cached device GPS data; only derived attendance outcome visible

cases.title: OutOfRadius mobile outcome panel shows localized message without echoing submitted coordinates
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport with GPS permission granted
Active session check-in deep link with valid token
Preflight returns 200 outcome Valid; GpsCaptureStep mounted per BR-15
Browser geolocation mocked to outside-radius coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
steps: Navigate to /check-in page; wait for preflight pass then GPS capture with outside coordinates
Submit check-in and verify OutOfRadius outcome panel with message Bạn đang ngoài phạm vi phòng học
Assert UI does not display submitted latitude or longitude values
Verify move-closer guidance visible without exposing exact coordinate digits
Inspect network response and assert no coordinate fields in JSON body
Retry after mock moves to in-radius coords and verify success without prior coordinates cached in UI state
cases.expected: NFR-12 client UX: failure path shows derived outcome message only; device coordinates never rendered in UI or retained in client state after attempt

cases.title: POST /api/v1/check-in OutOfRadius 400 error envelope excludes submitted latitude and longitude
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie set
Active sessionId with Valid QrToken and outside-radius coordinates (10.764122, 106.660172)
error-handling §1 privacy rule: raw GPS never in error payloads
steps: Send POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId, latitude: 10.764122, longitude: 106.660172, spoofMetadata: { mockLocationDetected: false } }
Assert HTTP status 400 with outcome OutOfRadius and errorCode OutOfRadius per API design §6.3
Parse response JSON and assert no latitude, longitude, clientLat, clientLng, or distanceMeters fields present
Assert message is localized Vietnamese guidance without echoing submitted coordinate digits
Query check_in_attempts and assert distance_meters logged server-side but not returned in response body
cases.expected: NFR-12 data minimization at API boundary: check-in failure responses never echo submitted device coordinates per error-handling §1 and API design §6.3

cases.title: SpoofFlagged security audit entry records heuristic signals without raw client latitude/longitude
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, enrolled student, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
CheckInService.submit callable with spoofMetadata.mockLocationDetected true
security_audit_log or equivalent append-only audit store per error-handling §6.2
steps: Invoke CheckInService.submit with in-radius coordinates and mockLocationDetected true
Assert outcome SpoofSuspected and attendance remains Pending
Query security audit log for SpoofFlagged event matching sessionId and studentId
Assert audit payload contains heuristic signals (e.g. mockLocationDetected, accuracyMeters) per error-handling §6.2
Assert audit entry contains no raw latitude, longitude, or submitted coordinate values
Query check_in_attempts and assert spoof_flags populated without raw client coordinate columns
cases.expected: NFR-12 extends to fraud audit path: SpoofFlagged events log heuristic metadata only; raw device GPS never persisted in audit or attempt tables
